head: 3944f62daff6287eeb2a7f086dd1594b78b9f311
duplicate_mapping_policy: root_cause_cluster; all independent finding_ids retained under each cluster

clusters.title: changed-scope 诊断入口对无效 explicit base_ref fail-open
clusters.root_cause: validate_project_governance.git_changed_files 在 explicit base 不存在时回落为空变更；lean changed-scope 未独立 fail-closed。
clusters.conflict_resolution: A1 将其描述为可能 required check false negative；父级控制样本证明当前 ci --changed-only 对同一 invalid base exit 1，因此不把当前 CI 判为 fail-open。但 changed-scope 作为人类/Agent 诊断入口仍会返回 0 与空范围，必须在候选设计中 fail-closed，不能当作无变更。
clusters.required_fix: 让 changed-scope 对 explicit base_ref unresolved 返回非零或结构化 unresolved_base；候选 check plan 不得消费 unresolved base 的空结果。
required_tests: changed-scope invalid base returns non-zero or unresolved_base=false equivalent with non-success decision
clusters.candidate_relevance: S2 反例矩阵必须覆盖 Git/base 错误 fail-closed。

findings.original_title: Invalid base_ref silently produces an empty changed scope
changed-scope diagnostic command reports success for an unresolved base ref

clusters.title: lean changed_scope 与底层 validator changed-only 项目选择不一致
clusters.root_cause: lean_governance.build_changed_scope 对根治理变更扩展项目范围；validate_project_governance.select_projects 仅按项目路径匹配，根治理变更选择 0 项目。
clusters.conflict_resolution: 无跨 Agent 反证。父级 monkeypatch 重放证明同一 changed_files fixture 下 lean selected=8，validator selected=[]。这是当前 root governance 变更路径的真实 false negative 风险。
clusters.required_fix: 统一 selector source of truth；validator 与 lean 输出必须来自同一项目选择结果，或由 CLI 显式传入并由 tests 锁定。
required_tests: root governance file changed fixture: validator checked projects equals changed_scope.selected_projects
selected_project_count>0 while validator checks none must fail
clusters.candidate_relevance: S2 必须裁决这是 shadow 前置阻塞还是 FIX-ONE 修复；不得用 shadow telemetry 掩盖。

findings.original_title: changed-only CI 的项目选择器与底层 validator 不一致

clusters.title: root governance 变更排除 required 项目 EEI 与 arxiv-daily-push
clusters.root_cause: governance/projects.yaml root_governance.changed_scope_excluded_projects 包含两个 ci_mode=required 项目。
clusters.conflict_resolution: 父级重放确认两个 required 项目不在 root scope 中。若无单独 required coverage，root contract/schema/workflow 变更可漏掉这些项目。
clusters.required_fix: 删除 required 项目的 root exclusion，或建立等价 required companion coverage 并在 tests 中证明。
required_tests: root governance change covers every ci_mode=required project or proves required companion job exists
clusters.candidate_relevance: S2 必须攻击 exclusion 是否合理；S3 不得新增更弱排除规则。

findings.original_title: Root governance changes exclude required projects from changed-scope checks

clusters.title: render --write 缺少 READ_ONLY/CI 写入门禁
clusters.required_fix: CLI write path 增加 run mode/CI guard；allowed IMPLEMENT 需显式元数据。

findings.original_title: render --write has no READ_ONLY or CI mode guard

clusters.title: full governance test step 可能在 checkout 写 pytest/Python cache
clusters.required_fix: CI 设置 PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE、PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX 到 RUNNER_TEMP，并禁用 pytest cache。

findings.original_title: Full governance test step can write pytest and Python caches inside the checkout

clusters.title: schedule/manual full evidence 可能被同 ref 并发取消
clusters.required_fix: 按 event/scope 拆分 concurrency，或 full evidence 禁用 cancel-in-progress。

findings.original_title: Workflow-level cancellation can preempt scheduled or manual full-governance evidence runs

clusters.title: diff-selection git 子进程缺少 per-command timeout
clusters.required_fix: 共享 bounded git helper，TimeoutExpired 转结构化错误。

findings.original_title: Diff-selection git subprocesses lack per-command timeouts

clusters.title: required governance workflow 使用 mutable action tags
clusters.required_fix: pin actions to commit SHA 或明确 allowlist。

findings.original_title: Required governance workflow uses mutable action version tags

clusters.title: render/check-render 未知项目输出 traceback
clusters.required_fix: CLI 边界捕获 ValueError，返回紧凑可操作错误和可用项目/下一动作。

findings.original_title: render 命令的未知项目错误泄露 traceback

clusters.title: README Governance Entry 未暴露 AGENTS.md 执行契约入口
clusters.required_fix: README 入口层级加入 AGENTS.md，保持 STANDARD 和三中文文件，不引入 yaml/dashboard 为 current truth。

findings.original_title: README 的 Governance Entry 隐藏最高优先级 AGENTS 入口

clusters.title: README Current Governance Snapshot 成为易过期平行真相源
clusters.required_fix: 移除或降级 README 内嵌运行快照；当前事实只在 run manifest/CI artifact/canonical facts。

findings.original_title: README 内嵌 Current Governance Snapshot 形成易过期真相源

tracked_write_policy: S1/S2 no tracked writes; evidence only under .git/codex-review/m1
